meaning: adj.[地](古生代)蒂锡斯海的,古地中海的
examples: They propose that during the Permian the Gangdise belt might be a fragment of Gondwana that floated in the Paleo-Tethyan Ocean.
The Yunkai Block, extended in southern Guangxi and western Guangdong, is located in the intersection area of the Tethyan and the circum Pacific tectonic zones.
The southern China is a part of the hydrocarbon-enriched belt of the Tethyan region, where abundant hydrocarbon resources were supplied with the primary deposits.
The development of the Tethyan Realm is such a complicated problem that it remains far from being clarified.
